text.tspan: Freshwater withdrawals as a share of internal resources, 2021
Freshwater withdrawals refer to total water withdrawals from agriculture, industry and municipal/domestic uses.
Withdrawals can exceed 100% of total renewable resources where extraction from non-renewable aquifers or
Data source: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
Note: Five classes have been identified to signal different levels of stress on water sources: <25%: no stress , 25-50%: low stress , 50-75%:
medium stress , 75-100%: high stress and >100%: critical stress .
